bundleModules: Core · Time Tracking · Time Off · Shifts
pricingJustification: Shifts module for percentage-based shift premiums (+30% / +40%) and tiered overtime multipliers (1.5x / 2.0x)
context: US manufacturing with 90 employees across 2 plants and 3 shifts. Global operations in UK, Scotland, Ireland, England, and Germany. Opening 2 manufacturing facilities in Brazil.
priorities: Shift tracking from spreadsheets, buddy punching on manual clocks, shift premium calculations (+30% second shift, +40% overnight), tiered overtime (1.5x / 2.0x), payroll spreadsheet for bookkeeper, paper-only HR documents, inclusive clock-in for flip-phone employees.
mobileStory: Tablet kiosk on plant wall for clock in/out (inclusive for flip-phone workforce). Mobile app for PTO and sick leave requests where employees have smartphones.
operationsStory: Starter Planning Enterprise: automated timesheets with percentage-based shift premiums and tiered overtime multipliers, shift management, and compensation export replacing manual spreadsheet payroll prep.
documentsStory: Core HR module covers centralized employee profiles and self-service demographic updates.
payrollStory: Factorial consolidates time, absences, and shift premiums. Third-party payroll provider / bookkeeper receives compensation export or direct platform access.
implementationStory: ~45 days implementation. 7 hours online onboarding. Target close July 2026 for September 1 fiscal year go-live.
nextSteps: Present to US board and UK C-suite next week. Decision within ~1 month. Full employee rollout September 1, 2026.
